en_title: Resident Evil Lore Master Reveals The 5 Burning Questions Veronica Needs to Answer
cn_title: 《生化危机》剧情大师揭示《维罗妮卡》重制版需解答的5大疑问
subtitle: 看点来了
opus_summary: 《生化危机》系列非官方剧情专家TheBatman近日就卡普空将于2027年推出的《生化危机 维罗妮卡》重制版发表看法，列出了该作必须解答的五个核心问题。

paragraphs.en: Resident Evil's unofficial lore master has weighed in with his thoughts on Resident Evil Veronica , and the five biggest questions that Capcom's upcoming remake will need to answer.
paragraphs.cn: 《生化危机》非官方剧情研究大师对《生化危机 维罗妮卡 重制版》发表了看法，并提出了卡普空即将推出的重制版需要回答的五大核心问题。

paragraphs.en: Set to launch in 2027 as a ground-up reimagining of the original Resident Evil: Code Veronica, our impressive first peek at the game felt like a statement of intent from Capcom — which now seems to be elevating this former side-story to full main series status.
paragraphs.cn: 该作计划于2027年发售，是原版《生化危机：代号维罗妮卡》的彻底重构。我们对游戏的初印象是卡普空的一纸意图声明——他们似乎正将这段曾经的支线剧情提升到正传地位。

paragraphs.en: Of course, Code Veronica featured some of the series' biggest stars (Claire Redfield! Chris Redfield! Albert Wesker!) in a canon story set following the events of Resident Evil 3. But the entry has always felt a little detached from the rest of the franchise's core, numbered entries. No longer, perhaps.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，《代号维罗妮卡》原本就集结了系列最耀眼的几位主角（克莱尔·雷德菲尔德！克里斯·雷德菲尔德！阿尔伯特·威斯克！），讲述了一段发生在《生化危机3》之后的正史故事。但这一作总让人觉得与系列核心的序号正传若即若离。如今，这种疏离或许将不复存在。

paragraphs.en: Still, with this stronger link to the rest of the series — and a launch long after subsequent games have already filled in some plot holes — there's potential for Capcom to go further, and use Resident Evil Veronica to really tie the original game into the franchise's wider narrative. But how could Capcom do this? How much will likely change? And what should stay the same?
paragraphs.cn: 不过，既然它与系列的关联变得如此紧密，又是在后续作品已填补了不少剧情漏洞之后才推出，卡普空完全有机会更进一步，用《维罗妮卡》重制版真正将原版故事融入更宏大的系列叙事。但卡普空要如何做到？剧情可能会有多大改动？哪些又该原封不动地保留？

paragraphs.en: For answers, I turned to Resident Evil Podcast host TheBatman, the architect of an exhaustive timeline document that charts all Resident Evil lore (beginning around 4.5 billion years ago) — a superfan who seems to know more about the series and its characters than anyone else on the planet.
paragraphs.cn: 为此，我请教了《生化危机》播客主持人TheBatman。他编制了一份详尽的《生化危机》时间线文档，囊括了所有剧情设定（最早可追溯到约45亿年前）——作为超级粉丝，他恐怕比地球上任何人都更了解这个系列及其角色。

paragraphs.en: Fair warning, this article discusses plot points from the original Resident Evil: Code Veronica. While these may change in the remake, anyone who wants to go in completely unspoiled should look away now.
paragraphs.cn: 友情提示：本文将讨论原版《生化危机：代号维罗妮卡》的剧情要点。虽然重制版中的设定可能会有所更改，但若想保持绝对新鲜感的读者，请现在就止步。

paragraphs.en: "This organisation was introduced in the original Code: Veronica and was active behind the scenes in several other games including RE4 before mysteriously vanishing," TheBatman begins. "Since then we’ve had one surprising reference in RE7 and a few teases in Requiem, but Capcom have always refrained from going into any major detail about them. Concept art refers to H.C.F. as Hive/Host Capture Force in reference to Wesker’s mission to capture Alexia Ashford and the t-veronica virus, so there is some suggestion they are a special forces team belonging to a larger organisation. RE: Veronica is the ideal opportunity to really clarify who they are and solidify any links to The Connections from the more recent games as we know they worked together on the Mutamycete project."
paragraphs.cn: TheBatman首先解释道：「这个组织最初在《代号：维罗妮卡》原版中登场，并在包括《生化危机4》在内的多部作品中暗中活动，随后神秘消失。后来在《生化危机7》里有一个出人意料的提及，在《Requiem》中也有数次暗示，但卡普空始终避免详细展开。概念图显示H.C.F. 指的是Hive/Host Capture Force，即蜂巢/宿主捕获部队，暗示他们是一支隶属于某个更大组织的特种部队。考虑到威斯克的任务就是捕获亚历克西娅·阿什福德和t-veronica病毒，所以有推测认为H.C.F. 是一支特别行动队。《生化危机 维罗妮卡》重制版正是澄清这个组织真面目以及确定它和新作中The Connections之间联系的理想机会，毕竟我们已经知道他们合作进行过Mutamycete项目。」

paragraphs.en: An international crime syndicate to which Requiem's villain Zeno belongs, The Connections were introduced in Resident Evil 7, though retroactively revealed to have had an influence on the downfall of Umbrella, plus links to Tricell and the U.S. government. They're currently viewed as being the series' overarching enemies, post-Umbrella.
paragraphs.cn: The Connections是一个国际犯罪集团，《Requiem》中的反派Zeno就隶属于它。该组织在《生化危机7》中首次登场，但后来揭示它影响了安布雷拉的垮台，并与Tricell以及美国政府存在联系。目前，它被视为安布雷拉之后系列作品中的头号反派。

paragraphs.en: "It wouldn't surprise me if Capcom retcon the rival company as being The Connections all along," TheBatman continues. "On the surface it seems logical but diving into the deeper lore that idea also creates several problems. I just hope this remake provides a clearer picture and background about who they are, why Umbrella perceived them as a such a threat and why Wesker saw the benefit in defecting over to them."
paragraphs.cn: TheBatman接着说：「如果卡普空把那个敌对的公司直接设定为一直就是The Connections，我一点也不会惊讶。表面上看这很合理，但深入挖掘设定后，这种想法也会带来不少问题。我只希望这次重制版能更清楚地交代他们到底是谁，为什么安布雷拉会视其为巨大威胁，以及威斯克为什么觉得投靠他们有好处。」

paragraphs.en: "I don't want them to tone down Alfred," TheBatman says. "I understand certain lines in the original localised script are unlikely to be used today, but his desire to impersonate Alexia is a key part of his character. He truly believes she is still by his side and dressing as her and mimicking her voice is a coping mechanism for his loneliness and psychosis. It was a significant plot twist in the original game so for a remake where many players will already be aware of this revelation, it will be interesting to see how Capcom plays it. Some of these elements may be scaled back but I personally hope they go all in as it could result in some really creepy and memorable scenes."
paragraphs.cn: TheBatman表示：「我不希望他们弱化阿尔弗雷德。我知道原版本地化脚本里某些台词今天可能不太合适，但他渴望模仿亚历克西娅是他性格的关键部分。他真的相信妹妹还在自己身边，而穿上她的衣服、模仿她的声音是他应对孤独和精神错乱的一种方式。这在原版游戏中是一个重要的剧情转折，所以对于一部很多玩家都已经知道这个真相的重制版来说，卡普空会怎么处理这一点将非常有趣。有些元素可能会被削弱，但我个人希望他们能全力保留，因为这可能制造出一些非常吓人且令人难忘的场面。」

paragraphs.en: In an interview with IGN earlier this month, Capcom told us that it would be adjusting Alfred by "trying to dive a little deeper" and analyze the character "on a slightly deeper level" within the remake, though stopped short of giving further details.
paragraphs.cn: 在本月早些时候接受IGN采访时，卡普空告诉我们，他们会对阿尔弗雷德进行调整，将「尝试更进一步深入刻画」他，并从「更深入的层面」分析这个角色，但没有给出更多细节。

paragraphs.en: "I also hope the remake expands on the history of the Ashford family. They originally had ties to the Nazis, but these references were almost completely removed from the original game, so it will be interesting to see if they are reintroduced here. I’d also love to see – on screen – Alexander Ashford’s expression as he is subdued and looked down upon by his own children as they inject him with the t-veronica virus. That is some terrifying imagery."
paragraphs.cn: TheBatman还说：「我也希望重制版能扩展阿什福德家族的历史。他们最初与纳粹有联系，但这些设定在原版游戏中几乎全部被删除，所以我很想知道重制版是否会重新引入。我还想在屏幕上看到亚历山大·阿什福德被他自己的孩子制服并俯视，然后被注射t-veronica病毒时的表情。那画面想想都令人不寒而栗。」

paragraphs.en: "Code: Veronica takes place three months after Raccoon City but has very little build-up - it kind of just happens," TheBatman explains. "RE3 provided epilogues for all the key characters, but ultimately they didn’t really go anywhere. I hope RE: Veronica really expands on the back story in this three-month gap leading up to events on Rockfort Island. What has Chris been doing all this time in Europe? How long has Umbrella been watching him? Why didn’t Jill Valentine link up with him immediately after Raccoon City? There are so many unanswered questions and now is the right time to address them. Chris’s apartment in the teaser is ripe for exploration to get some of these answers, although witnessing a little old lady stealing his biscuits was not on my bingo card…"
paragraphs.cn: 「《维罗妮卡》的故事发生在浣熊市事件三个月后，但几乎没有铺垫——事情就那么突兀地发生了，」TheBatman解释道，「《生化危机3》为所有关键角色提供了尾声，但最终他们并没有真正去往哪里。我希望《维罗妮卡》重制版能好好拓展这三个月空白期里的幕后故事，一直铺垫到洛克福特岛上的事件。克里斯这段时间在欧洲到底在做什么？安布雷拉监视他多久了？为什么吉尔·瓦伦蒂安没有在浣熊市之后直接去和他会合？有太多未解的问题，而现在正是解答它们的最佳时机。预告片里克里斯的公寓正好适合翻找答案，不过我没想到会看到一位老太太偷他的饼干……」

paragraphs.en: "Steve is very polarising so I fully expect he will be the character that has the most changes and his performance be significantly toned down," TheBatman says of Code Veronica's widely-disliked 17-year-old.
paragraphs.cn: 「史蒂夫这个角色非常两极分化，所以我完全预计他将是改动最大的角色，他的表演也会被大幅收敛，」TheBatman谈到《维罗妮卡》里这位广受厌恶的17岁少年时说道。

paragraphs.en: "He is a victim of circumstance and at 17 years-old I still want him to retain some of that immature bravado and naivety around Claire, but some of his scenes from the original will be changed significantly, most notably where he makes a move on Claire whilst she is asleep. That would not go down well today. He is another tragic character, and I hope they learn in more about his relationship with his father and the events that saw him brought to Rockfort Island. I’m very keen to see how his relationship with Claire plays out here."
paragraphs.cn: 「他是环境的受害者，而且年仅17岁，我仍然希望他保留一些不成熟的虚张声势和对克莱尔的天真，但他原作中的某些戏份将大幅改动，最明显的是他趁克莱尔睡着时对她示好的一幕。那在今天是绝对行不通的。他也是个悲剧角色，我希望他们能更多地展示他和父亲的关系，以及他为何会被带到洛克福特岛。我很想看看他和克莱尔的关系在这里会如何发展。」

paragraphs.en: "I think it’s safe to say the main story beats will remain unchanged but the finer plot points will be significantly changed," TheBatman says. "We’ve already seen in the teaser that Claire already knows Chris' location in Europe before she even gets to the island, which is a big change from the original. Capcom has said it wants to make the series feel more connected and cohesive . Audiences are already very familiar with Hunk thanks to Requiem, so it’s logical to have him capture Claire and take her to Rockfort rather than Rodrigo, who can be introduced later. In the original, Hunk trained on Rockfort Island and was there just prior to the events of the game having transported a Tyrant. As he has a reason to be included and is fresh in the memory, why not make him front and center this time out?
paragraphs.cn: 「我觉得可以说主要的故事节奏不会变，但更细的情节会做大幅改动，」TheBatman说，「我们在预告片里已经看到，克莱尔在抵达岛屿之前就已经知道了克里斯在欧洲的位置，这与原版相比是个巨大的改动。卡普空已经表示，希望让这个系列感觉更加连贯、统一。观众们已经通过Requiem对汉克非常熟悉，所以让他抓住克莱尔并把她带到洛克福特，而不是罗德里戈——后者可以稍后再介绍——是合乎逻辑的。在原著中，汉克曾在洛克福特岛受训，并且在游戏事件发生前夕就在岛上运送过一只暴君。既然他有理由被纳入剧情，而且观众也对他记忆犹新，何不这次就让他成为焦点呢？」

paragraphs.en: "Likewise, Wesker’s story arc ultimately leads to Uroboros, so I expect his role to be expanded and his motivations for acquiring t-veronica to line up more clearly with his desire to cull humanity and leave only the superior behind. Code: Veronica was the first game to dive into the history of Umbrella so that can be expanded. Something like adding references to James Marcus in the files is such an easy thing to do that would immediately strengthen ties to RE Zero."
paragraphs.cn: 「同样，威斯克的故事线最终导向了衔尾蛇计划，所以我预计他的戏份会扩大，他夺取T-维罗妮卡病毒的动机也会更明确地与他想要淘汰人类、只留下优等人的欲望一致起来。《维罗妮卡》是第一款深入挖掘安布雷拉历史的游戏，这一点可以进一步展开。在文件里加入对詹姆斯·马库斯的引用，就是一件轻而易举的事，能立刻增强与《生化危机0》的关联。」

paragraphs.en: Remember, of course, that Resident Evil Zero is also due to get Capcom's remake treatment. While unannounced, leaks verified by IGN suggest a new version of the prequel will land in 2028, a year after Veronica.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，别忘了《生化危机0》也即将得到卡普空的重制待遇。虽然尚未正式宣布，但经IGN证实的泄露内容显示，这部前传的新版本将于2028年推出，比《维罗妮卡》晚一年。

paragraphs.en: "There is also the opportunity to explain some of the plight Umbrella are in following Raccoon City," TheBatman concludes. "In the original we had no context for five years until RE4 was released but now we know about the business suspension orders, the Raccoon Trials and their face-off with the government. Adding significant backstory in the three-month gap between Raccoon’s destruction and the events of this game is the perfect opportunity to really connect the wider series.
paragraphs.cn: 「此外，还有机会解释保护伞公司在拉昆市事件后的部分困境，」TheBatman总结道。「原版里我们对此毫无头绪，直到五年后《生化危机4》发售才有所了解，但现在我们知道了那些业务暂停令、拉昆市审判以及公司与政府的对抗。在拉昆市毁灭到本作事件之间的三个月空档期加入大量背景故事，正是串联整个系列的大好机会。」

paragraphs.en: "We know Claire ultimately joins TerraSave so can her role be adjusted slightly to accommodate this? Perhaps the organisation was established, and she joined prior to the events of RE: Veronica? These kinds of changes can easily be implanted without breaking canon.I also suspect Capcom will find a way to get The Connections into this story. As I mentioned above it could be a case of retconning them to be the rival company, in which case that would by default put them in Resident Evil 4 and strengthen ties to the later games. Unlike Raccoon City, the events of Code: Veronica are quite standalone so there is a lot of flexibility to restructure and remix the storyline whilst still preserving the core events that ensures continuity with the later sequels."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们知道克莱尔最终加入了TerraSave，那么能否稍微调整她的角色来配合这一点？也许这个组织在此期间成立，而她在《生化危机 代号：维罗妮卡》事件之前就加入了？这类改动很容易植入，而且不会违背正史。我还觉得卡普空会想办法把The Connections也牵扯进这个故事。正如我前面提到的，可以吃书将他们设定为那家敌对的公司，这样他们自然也会出现在《生化危机4》中，并加强后续作品的关联。与拉昆市的剧情不同，《代号：维罗妮卡》的事件相对独立，因此在重组和混合故事线时有很大灵活性，同时仍能保留保证后续续作连续性的核心事件。」

paragraphs.en: Wrapping up, TheBatman says he hopes Veronica is used to reveal more about Edward Ashford, the third founding member of Umbrella whose backstory remains relatively unexplored. But for him — and many more fans, most likely — Veronica will provide an even more enticing oppurtunity to feature additional details on Albert Wesker.
paragraphs.cn: 最后，TheBatman说，他希望《维罗妮卡》重制版能用来揭示更多有关爱德华·阿什福德的信息，他是保护伞公司的第三位创始人，其背景故事仍然相对未被探索。但对于他——以及很可能还有更多的粉丝——来说，《维罗妮卡》将提供一个更诱人的机会，加入有关阿尔伯特·威斯克的更多细节。

paragraphs.en: The original Resident Evil baddie's return in Code: Veronica was left somewhat unexplained, with additional detail added later, in Wesker’s Report and Umbrella Chronicles. Could Veronica add more information, and potentially tie the game into a future Resident Evil 5 remake as well? As TheBatman himself says, "the opportunity is certainly there."
paragraphs.cn: 这位原版《生化危机》反派在《代号：维罗妮卡》中的回归当时缺乏解释，后来才在《威斯克报告》和《安布雷拉历代记》中补充了细节。《维罗妮卡》重制版能否提供更多信息，甚至将其与未来的《生化危机5》重制版也联系起来？正如TheBatman所说，「机会肯定是有的。」

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑，可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。

translated_terms.Resident Evil Veronica: 生化危机 维罗妮卡 重制版
